en.text: a primitive root; properly, to be enclosed (as if with fat); by implication (as denominative from H3824); to unheart; also as denominative from H3834 i.e. (in a good sense) transport (with love), or (in a bad sense) stultify; to make cakes

senses.gloss_en: a primitive root; properly, to be enclosed (as if with fat); by implication (as denominative from H3824); to unheart; also as denominative from H3834 i.e. (in a good sense) transport (with love), or (in a bad sense) stultify; to make cakes
